nasb.text: “When the Lord your God extends your border as He has promised you, and you say, ‘I will eat meat,’ because you desire to eat meat, then you may eat meat, whatever you desire.

esv.text: “When the Lord your God enlarges your territory, as he has promised you, and you say, ‘I will eat meat,’ because you crave meat, you may eat meat whenever you desire.

cnv.text: “耶和華你的　神，照著他應許你的，擴張了你的境界的時候，如果你因心裡渴想吃肉，說：‘我想吃肉。’那麼，你就可以隨意吃肉。

ccb.text: “你们的上帝耶和华按照祂的应许扩展你们的疆域后，你们若想吃肉，随时都可以吃。
